description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.1 Docker image with a postgres service and a global DB_NAME=postgres variable. Add a before_script that runs gem install bundler, bundle install, and bundle exec rake db:create for all jobs. Define a notify job dockerhub that runs only on branches, executes curl http://dockerhub/URL, and is tagged ruby and postgres. Define a deploy job production that runs on the master branch and any branch matching /^deploy-.*$/, runs cap deploy production and cap notify, uses ruby and mysql tags, and overrides DB_NAME to mysql. Define a test job rspec that runs on branches, executes rake spec, and is tagged ruby and postgres. Define a test job spinach that allows failure, runs on all except tags, executes rake spinach, and is tagged ruby and mysql. Define a deploy job staging that runs on all except the stable branch, executes cap deploy stating, uses ruby and mysql tags, and sets KEY1=value1 and KEY2=value2.
